title: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Dry Bulk Report - August 1, 2023
section_path: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Dry Bulk Report - August 1, 2023
section_path_text: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Dry Bulk Report - August 1, 2023
summary:
Main
• The Atlantic Capesize market awakens, while weather in the Pacific could soon become a positive catalyst - In the absence of any major macro developments, the dry bulk market has recently been affected by the normal supply-demand imbalances natural to the shipping sector, where supply of ships sometimes becomes scarce due to scheduling issues. The Atlantic Capesize market is currently subject to such an imbalance, and as a result, rates in that part of the world have recently moved higher, at least versus other areas. Although overall spot rates remain well below recent years, it is encouraging to see some volatility following a month of stagnant rates.
